---
title: "Deployment"
linkTitle: "Deployment"
description: "Building for production and publishing to GitHub Pages and Cloudflare."
weight: 50
featured: true
---

A tago-doks site is static files. You can host them anywhere. This section
covers building with the right base URL, including the sub-path case that trips
up most static sites, and a worked example that publishes to both GitHub Pages
and Cloudflare Pages from a single push. It is the same setup that publishes
this site.
